function_nodes.name: AlphaGuard
function_nodes.description: Protects α=0.367 — the v2 peak coupling value

function_nodes.name: NegGuard
function_nodes.description: Protects neg_frac=0.636 — the peak negentropic value

function_nodes.name: ContextGuard
function_nodes.description: Protects bigram context entropy — prevents the-loop collapse

function_nodes.name: CurriculumGuard
function_nodes.description: Protects curriculum phase progress — prevents regression
